info.title: GroktoCrawl
info.description: Self-hosted, Firecrawl-compatible web scraping and AI research API. MIT licensed.

post.description: Create a crawl job. Supports full Firecrawl v2 feature parity: path filtering (glob and regex), sitemap modes (include/skip/only), configurable concurrency and delay, robots.txt enforcement, content dedup (canonical + hash), caching with maxAge/minAge, per-page webhooks with HMAC signing, SSE streaming, NL-to-params via prompt, and advanced scrape options passthrough.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the first page to return. Used for pagination.

get.description: Get crawl job status and paginated results. Supports pagination via the offset query parameter and next response field. Returns enhanced metadata including created_at, completed_at, expires_at, duration, and per-page enrichment (title, status_code, content_type, scraped_at, duration_ms).

404.description: Job not found or already completed

post.description: Extract structured data from provided URLs.

get.description: Get extract job status and results.

post.description: Upload a file and get its content as markdown.
Generate an llms.txt file for a website.

get.description: Get llms.txt generation job status and results.

post.description: Preview crawl parameters derived from a natural-language prompt. Accepts a url and prompt, translates the prompt into crawl parameters using the LLM, and returns the derived parameters WITHOUT starting a crawl job. Synchronous — no job ID is created.

get.description: List all active/processing crawl jobs. Returns only jobs with kind: 'crawl'. Excludes completed, failed, and cancelled crawls by default. Filterable via the status query parameter.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by job status. Default: processing.

get.description: Return per-URL errors and robots-blocked URLs for a crawl job. Includes error type classification, HTTP status codes, and timestamps for each failed URL.
Reconnect to a crawl SSE stream or replay completed results. Delivers page, progress, done, and error events as Server-Sent Events for real-time crawl progress monitoring.

urls.title: Urls
urls.description: Optional seed URLs to constrain research

action.title: Action
action.description: Action: navigate, click, type, screenshot, scroll, wait, getContent, executeScript

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL to start crawling from

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape. Must be >= 1.

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum link-follow depth. Pages at max_depth are scraped but their links are not followed.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Alias for max_pages. When both are set, the stricter (minimum) wins.

ignore_sitemap.title: Ignore Sitemap
ignore_sitemap.description: When true, sitemap discovery is skipped (equivalent to sitemap='skip'). Backward compatibility.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Sitemap mode: 'include' (default, sitemap+HTML), 'skip' (HTML only), or 'only' (sitemap only).

ignore_query_parameters.title: Ignore Query Parameters
ignore_query_parameters.description: When true, query-string variants of the same base URL are collapsed to one fetch.

include_paths.title: Include Paths
include_paths.description: Glob or regex patterns for URLs to include.

exclude_paths.title: Exclude Paths
exclude_paths.description: Glob or regex patterns for URLs to exclude (takes precedence over include_paths).

regex_on_full_url.title: Regex On Full URL
regex_on_full_url.description: When true, include_paths/exclude_paths are treated as regex patterns rather than globs.

verbose.title: Verbose
verbose.description: When true, track filtered-out URLs with reasons in the response.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.description: Webhook config for per-page and completion events.

crawl_entire_domain.title: Crawl Entire Domain
crawl_entire_domain.description: When true, ignores max_depth and follows all reachable pages up to max_pages.

allow_subdomains.title: Allow Subdomains
allow_subdomains.description: When true, follow links to subdomains of the base domain.

allow_external_links.title: Allow External Links
allow_external_links.description: When true, follow links to external domains (with SSRF safety guard).

max_concurrency.title: Max Concurrency
max_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent page scrapes. Values > 50 are capped to 50. Forced to 1 when delay is set.

delay.title: Delay
delay.description: Delay in seconds between scrapes. Forces concurrency to 1 when set.

ignore_robots_txt.title: Ignore Robots Txt
ignore_robots_txt.description: When true, bypass robots.txt enforcement. All discovered URLs are scraped regardless of Disallow rules.

scrape_options.title: Scrape Options
scrape_options.description: Per-page scrape options applied to every page in the crawl.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Natural language description of what to crawl. Used to derive crawl parameters via LLM. Explicitly-set parameters override LLM-derived ones.

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: When true, the crawl response is delivered as Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream.

status.title: Status
status.description: Job status: processing, completed, failed, or cancelled.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of pages discovered (scraped + queued).

credits_used.title: Credits Used
credits_used.description: Number of credits consumed (1 per page scraped).

data.title: Data
data.description: List of scraped page objects with url, markdown, metadata, and per-page enrichment.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the job failed.

next.title: Next
next.description: URL for the next chunk of paginated results. Present when data exceeds ~10MB. Null when all data fits in a single response.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the crawl was created.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the crawl finished. Null while processing.

expires_at.title: Expires At
expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when results expire (24h after creation).

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Elapsed milliseconds between created_at and completed_at. Null while processing.

url.title: Url
url.description: Site URL to generate llms.txt for

allow_subdomains.title: Allow Subdomains
allow_subdomains.description: When true, include links to subdomains.

allow_external_links.title: Allow External Links
allow_external_links.description: When true, include links to external domains.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL of the scraped page.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Page metadata including title, description, language, sourceURL, statusCode.

status_code.title: Status Code
status_code.description: HTTP status code of the page.

content_type.title: Content Type
content_type.description: MIME content type of the response (e.g., text/html).

scraped_at.title: Scraped At
scraped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this page was scraped.

duration_ms.title: Duration Ms
duration_ms.description: Time in milliseconds to scrape this individual page.

formats.title: Formats
formats.description: Output formats: markdown, html, links, screenshot, rawHtml, screenshot@fullPage.

include_tags.title: Include Tags
include_tags.description: Only include content from these CSS selectors.

exclude_tags.title: Exclude Tags
exclude_tags.description: Exclude content from these CSS selectors.

wait_for.title: Wait For
wait_for.description: Wait time in milliseconds before extraction.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to forward with the request.

max_age.title: Max Age
max_age.description: Maximum age of cached content in milliseconds.

min_age.title: Min Age
min_age.description: Minimum age for cache-only mode in milliseconds.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Ordered list of browser actions to execute before scraping each page.

location.title: Location
location.description: Geo-location settings for the browser session.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: Proxy selection hint: basic, enhanced, or auto.

block_ads.title: Block Ads
block_ads.description: When true, strip ad content from scraped pages.

parsers.title: Parsers
parsers.description: List of parser types. At minimum ["pdf"] is recognised.

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum pages configured for this crawl.

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Maximum depth configured for this crawl.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL that produced the error.

error_type.title: Error Type
error_type.description: Machine-readable error category (e.g., timeout, robots_blocked, dns_error, http_error, scrape_error, cache_miss, duplicate_canonical, duplicate_content).

error_code.title: Error Code
error_code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g., TIMEOUT, ROBOTS_BLOCKED, SCRAPE_ERROR).

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the error occurred.

timeout_ms.title: Timeout Ms
timeout_ms.description: For timeout errors, the per-scrape timeout in milliseconds.

elapsed_ms.title: Elapsed Ms
elapsed_ms.description: For timeout errors, the actual elapsed time before timeout in milliseconds.

http_status.title: Http Status
http_status.description: For HTTP errors, the HTTP status code.

errors.title: Errors
errors.description: List of error objects from the crawl.

robots_blocked.title: Robots Blocked
robots_blocked.description: Subset of errors containing only URLs blocked by robots.txt or politeness.

url.title: Url
url.description: The target URL to crawl (used for context).

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Natural language description of what to crawl.

robots_user_agent.title: Robots User Agent
robots_user_agent.description: Derived custom User-Agent for robots.txt evaluation.

deduplicate_similar_urls.title: Deduplicate Similar Urls
deduplicate_similar_urls.description: Whether similar URL deduplication is recommended.

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the LLM is unavailable.
